html:
Exclusive to:

“The urge to pull this lever is... unusually strong.”

-Lever

Lever is a structure that can be found in Sequitor's Puzzle room of Sanctum. Pulling it will start the puzzle.

Another set of 3 Levers can be found in the Purifier Room. Pulling the Lever will activate the Sanctum Purifiers and grant access to Key Room.

Lustrous Weevil

“The urge to pull this lever is... even stronger this time.”

-

Lever is a structure that can be found in Key Room of Sanctum. Pulling it drop the Lustrous Weevil from the claw.

Gallery

  • Lever Animation from Rhymes with Play stream.

Trivia

  • The Lever was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.
  • The Lever for Lustrous Weevil was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.
plainText:
Lever
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
Sequitor's Puzzle: "abysspillar_trial"
Purifier Room: "vault_decon_switch"
"vault_decon_switch_reset"
"vault_decon_switch_reset2"
Exclusive to:
“I've got some pull around here.”
–Wilson
“Just pull it already!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang has pulled much bigger levers.”
–Wolfgang
“Shall we?”
–Wendy
“ACTIVATION SWITCH”
–WX-78
“A mechanical lever designed to actuate a mechanism.”
–Wickerbottom
“I know, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Let's get on with it then.”
–Maxwell
“Why döth we linger? The fray awaits!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll pull it!”
–Webber
“Is it safe?”
–Warly
“Pull?”
–Wormwood
“Levers were made for pullin'.”
–Winona
“A clever little lever!”
–Wortox
“Me pull!”
–Wurt
“Great idea, Woby! Let's pull it!”
–Walter
“Is it my choice to pull the lever now if I already know what I'm going to do?”
–Wanda
“The urge to pull this lever is... unusually strong.”
-Lever
Lever is a structure that can be found in Sequitor's Puzzle room of Sanctum. Pulling it will start the puzzle.
Another set of 3 Levers can be found in the Purifier Room. Pulling the Lever will activate the Sanctum Purifiers and grant access to Key Room.
Lustrous Weevil[edit | edit source]
Lever
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_crawler_lever"
“It's just a mysterious lever, what's the worst that could happen?”
–Wilson
“Ooooooh, I wonder what that does!”
–Willow
“Stand back! Wolfgang will pull!”
–Wolfgang
“Sigh. Something terrible will probably happen if I pull it.”
–Wendy
“ENGAGE!”
–WX-78
“There's no way to predict what will happen, but the result will be informative, at least.”
–Wickerbottom
“What's the worst that could happen, eh?”
–Woodie
“Throw the switch...”
–Maxwell
“Steel thyself, and pull!”
–Wigfrid
“We're gonna give it a big pull!”
–Webber
“I wonder what might happen if I pull that lever?”
–Warly
“Pull?”
–Wormwood
“Here goes nothin'!”
–Winona
“Pull the lever, win a prize!”
–Wortox
“Pull! Pull!”
–Wurt
“What's the worst that could happen?”
–Walter
“I do wish I could remember what that does.”
–Wanda
“The urge to pull this lever is... even stronger this time.”
-
Lever is a structure that can be found in Key Room of Sanctum. Pulling it drop the Lustrous Weevil from the claw.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Lever Animation from Rhymes with Play stream.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Lever was introduced in the Ancient Echoes update.
The Lever for Lustrous Weevil was introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đòn bẩy là một công trình có thể tìm thấy trong phòng Sequitor's Puzzle ở Sanctum. Kéo nó sẽ bắt đầu câu đố.
